fiction.title: James
fiction.author: Percival Everett
fiction.description: A reimagining of Adventures of Huckleberry Finn is told from the perspective of the enslaved Jim.

fiction.title: The Women
fiction.author: Kristin Hannah
fiction.description: A young woman follows her brother to serve as a nurse in Vietnam and returns to a divided America.

fiction.title: Intermezzo
fiction.author: Sally Rooney
fiction.description: Two brothers navigate grief, love, and family in the aftermath of their father's death.

fiction.title: Orbital
fiction.author: Samantha Harvey
fiction.description: Six astronauts orbit the earth sixteen times in twenty-four hours, watching the planet below.

fiction.title: All Fours
fiction.author: Miranda July
fiction.description: A woman in her mid-forties sets out on a road trip from Los Angeles to New York.

nonfiction.title: Nexus
nonfiction.author: Yuval Noah Harari
nonfiction.description: A brief history of information networks from the Stone Age to artificial intelligence.

nonfiction.title: Eruption
nonfiction.author: Michael Crichton & Eric Singer
nonfiction.description: When Hawaii's Mauna Loa volcano threatens to erupt, a team races to prevent catastrophe.

nonfiction.title: Revenge of the Tipping Point
nonfiction.author: Malcolm Gladwell
nonfiction.description: An examination of the dark side of social epidemics and the tipping point concept.

nonfiction.title: Nuclear War: A Scenario
nonfiction.author: Annie Jacobsen
nonfiction.description: A minute-by-minute account of what would happen if nuclear war broke out.

nonfiction.title: Say Nothing
nonfiction.author: Patrick Radden Keefe
nonfiction.description: A true story of murder and memory in Northern Ireland.
